query:
SELECT EXISTS(
                SELECT 1
                FROM codigos_descarga_gratis cdg
                INNER JOIN codigos_gratis_usos cgu ON cgu.codigo_id = cdg.id
                WHERE cdg.codigo = $1
                  AND cdg.tipo = $2
                  AND cdg.target_id = $3
                  AND cgu.usuario_id = $4
                  AND cgu.expirado = FALSE
                  AND cdg.activo = TRUE
                  AND cdg.expires_at > NOW()
            ) AS "allowed!"
